title: 1001 Nights
description: An AI-native narrative game where language reshapes reality. Players co-create stories with AI characters who dynamically alter game states and environments through conversation. Featured at ChinaJoy 2025, A MAZE./Berlin, Ars Electronica, and more.

title: One Kiss: Emojis as Agents of Genre Flux
description: A generative comics system where emojis act as genre-transforming agents. Accepted at ACM CHI EA 2026, Barcelona.

title: Surrealist VR: 17th-Century European Fascination with China
description: An immersive VR narrative environment exploring surrealism and orientalist aesthetics. Presented as Art Paper at SIGGRAPH Asia 2024, Tokyo.
